title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Luffy, Unknown person #10, Chopper, Gerd, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they find out we freed lol, they'll banish us, won't they?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then we'll be banished! We've got no choice.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna go call a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should stock up on meat too, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Knowing you, you won't be at your best if you don't eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's plenty of meat over there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way!! Don't even joke about something like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Those guys are my buddies!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can just go hunting in the mountains later!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's meat, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone who becomes my friend is off the menu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Alright, alright... my bad.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Let's find a doctor first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Uh- huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please don't do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told '10J!! Island clouds can't sustain themselves in the realm of the dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought we could use their last bit of bugiancy before they disappeared!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: I'll save you, Gerd-CHAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We couldn't waste time getting a lift!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is an emergency!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If LOKI escapes, all hell will break loose!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's all over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We're all gonna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sorry, GUIS!! I made the wrong call!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't blame you!!! You were thinking about the safety of Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What a Life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GUM-GUM BALLOON!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even walking away from that hurt is a miracle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it weren't for you, we'd be dead for sure!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... we had to hurry though. I'm glad we made it in time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please don't go through with your plan to release LOKI, Straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I forced Rodo to spill the beans!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Forgive me, Luffy- Taso!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You can't trust Lok!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's a cunning, ruthless trickster, black-hearted and beyond redemption.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Since we were kids!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even when he did or said something nice...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was all a lie! He's a fiend who betrays others without a second thought!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Lori's a threat to the entire world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm afraid you're already too late.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
